global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent logo, a clear message, and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to sign up for a service with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo featuring the text 'VaultRun' in bold, clear typography against a light background.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: An abstract shape that appears to be a combination of a circle and a rectangle, rendered in a minimalistic style.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Secure & simple' followed by smaller text 'Fast signup, instant card', conveying a straightforward message.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: VaultRun headline
elements.description: The word 'VaultRun' prominently displayed at the top of the ad in a large, bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Try for free' in white on a dark background.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
